scores.correctness_notes: The YAML is correct and complete. Includes all three required elements (HTTP health check, custom env vars, log target). Uses valid `on-success`/`on-failure` service exit fields (not the same as `on-check-failure` from the gold standard, but both are real and valid). Adds a second readiness check as extra correct detail. Missing `on-check-failure` to explicitly link checks to service restart actions, but this is optional and the gold standard is not exhaustive.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — `on-success`/`on-failure` are real Pebble service exit-action fields; `description` is a valid layer field; all other fields (override, level, period, timeout, threshold, http, headers, log-targets type/location/services/labels) are correct Pebble API.
